understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate through multiple levels by reaching the '+' gem tile, avoiding spikes, using clicks to clear breakable blocks ('x'), and managing limited turns per attempt (50). If an attempt failed, the level restarted with the failure logged.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each move, gravity (which was DOWN in this episode) pulled the player to a landing tile. Spikes ('u'/'v') caused instant failure. Breakable blocks ('x') could be removed with CLICK to open fall paths. The structured state provided left_landing and right_landing previews showing where gravity would take the player. Corridor scans revealed columns where falling would change the player's y-level. I had 2 attempts per level with a budget of 50 turns each; failing consumed an attempt and restarted the level.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate through multiple levels by reaching the '+' gem tile, avoiding spikes, using clicks to clear breakable blocks ('x'), and managing limited turns per attempt (50). If an attempt failed, the level restarted with the failure logged.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After each move, gravity (which was DOWN in this episode) pulled the player to a landing tile. Spikes ('u'/'v') caused instant failure. Breakable blocks ('x') could be removed with CLICK to open fall paths. The structured state provided left_landing and right_landing previews showing where gravity would take the player. Corridor scans revealed columns where falling would change the player's y-level. I had 2 attempts per level with a budget of 50 turns each; failing consumed an attempt and restarted the level.
